22 = Outpatient Hospital. A portion of a hospital which provides diagnostic, therapeutic (both 
surgical and nonsurgical), and rehabilitation services to sick or injured persons who do not 
require hospitalization or institutionalization. 
23 = Emergency Room — Hospital. A portion of a hospital where emergency diagnosis and 
treatment of illness or injury is provided.
